violations.text: In-use utensils (drink stirrers) were not allowed to air dry after taken from sanitizer containers. Inspector and PIC discussed storage alternatives for between use storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025
Boxes of single service items are being stored on shelving that is not at least 6 inches off the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025
